understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver all selectable pieces (P and S) onto goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level to achieve WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece one cell (3 pixels); adjacent pushables like blocks (B) can be pushed along; walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches control to another selectable at the exact target_position without relocating pieces.
